{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Fisher Gesha's drudge
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Fisher Gesha's drudge]] is a huge purple spider.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c12">''Skysworn'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Fisher Gesha]] has a [[drudge]] with eight metallic purple legs.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
